text:
Communications with the court

All communications to the court about this order should be sent to –

[Court name]

[Court address]

Tel:	[Court telephone]

If the order is made at the Royal Courts of Justice, communications should be addressed as follows:

The Clerk of the Rules, Queen’s Building, Royal Courts of Justice, Strand, London WC2A 2LL quoting the case number [number]. The telephone number is 020 7947 6543.

The offices are open between 10 a.m. and 4.30 p.m. Monday to Friday.

Name and address of applicant’s legal representatives

The applicant’s legal representatives are –

[applicant’s firm name]

[applicant’s firm’s address]

Ref:	[applicant’s reference]

DX:	[applicant’s firm’s DX address]

Email:	[applicant’s firm’s email address]

Phone:	[applicant’s firm’s phone number] (office hours)

[[applicant’s firm’s out of hours phone number] (out of office hours)

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 1: Financial Remedies (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the Family Court		Case No: [Case number]
